calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Mia S. Blackler, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Addison Avenue Federal Credit Union.
Donna Riordan, a Collection Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Leo Yakovlev, a/k/a Leanid L. Yakovlev, a/k/a Leonid Yakovlev, a/k/a Yakovlev Leo.
Default was entered against defendant on July 28, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 18, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Addison Avenue Federal Credit Union, and against the Defaulted Defendant Leo Yakovlev, a/k/a Leanid L. Yakovlev, a/k/a Leonid Yakovlev, a/k/a Yakovlev Leo, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46,721.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,244.00.
Attorney's Fees - $5,675.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $68,065.50.

Additionally, the Court Orders that plaintiff shall have possession of the 2000 Toyota Tundra, VIN STBBT4412YS052936, and that the California Department of Motor Vehicles is enjoined from allowing any parties to transfer interest of the afore-mentioned 2000 Toyota Tundra, or re-register said vehicle, without written consent from plaintiff.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
